hero.bio: An active Informatics student focusing on information system development, UI/UX design, and digital strategies. Experienced in designing solutions from the conceptual stage through to visual execution.

about.label: About Me
about.desc_1: An active Informatics student specializing in information system development, UI/UX design, and digital strategies. Demonstrated comprehensive experience in engineering technological solutions from the conceptual phase through to visual execution, encompassing robust graphic asset creation and strategic social media management.
about.desc_2: An analytical and innovative individual, highly adaptable and ready to collaborate within cross-functional teams to engineer digital products that deliver tangible impact. Deeply passionate about the intersection of design and engineering — crafting interfaces that are as visually exceptional as they are functionally robust.
